text: OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump have now welcomed the UK’s King Charles III and Queen Camilla to the White House for the White House State Dinner. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2049274027768709580/video/1 tweet

text: WarMonitor Fetterman was the only Democrat to side with Republicans, while Susan Collins and Rand Paul were the only Republicans to break ranks. They own whatever happens next. NEW: The U.S. Senate voted 51–47 to reject a resolution that would’ve blocked Trump from launching a military strike on Cuba without congressional approval. Trump has repeatedly said in recent months that “Cuba is next” after Venezuela and Iran. https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2049268700667101383/photo/1 - Republicans against Trump tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 费特曼是唯一支持共和党人的民主党人，而苏珊·柯林斯和兰德·保罗是仅有的两位打破党派立场的共和党人。接下来发生的一切都由他们负责。最新消息：美国参议院以 51 票对 47 票否决了一项决议，该决议本可以阻止特朗普在未经国会批准的情况下对古巴发动军事打击。特朗普近几个月来多次表示，继委内瑞拉和伊朗之后，“下一个就是古巴”。https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2049268700667101383/photo/1 - 反对特朗普的共和党人推文

text: ⚡️ 🇨🇦 🇺🇸 Canadian Defence Minister McGuinty explains why Canada purchase of 88 F-35s is still under review. Reporter: "Why is the m 35 contract still under review? Like, it's been under review for months. What's the holdup on this?” McGuinty: “It's a really important analysis that we're conducting. It's one of the largest procurements in Canadian history. Obviously, it speaks to industrial benefits. It speaks to buy Canadian provisions. Speaks to jobs. It speaks to investment. It speaks to subcontracting. It speaks to all kinds of issues that are important for us." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇨🇦 🇺🇸 加拿大国防部长麦金蒂解释了为何加拿大购买 88 架 F-35 战机的计划仍在审查中。记者：“为什么 F-35 合同仍在审查中？这已经审查好几个月了。到底在拖延什么？”麦金蒂：“我们正在进行非常重要的分析。这是加拿大历史上最大的采购项目之一。显然，这涉及工业利益。涉及购买加拿大产品的条款。涉及就业。涉及投资。涉及分包。涉及我们关心的各种问题。”@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🤡 State Department to release limited edition ‘America250’ passports with Trump’s face The State Department is rolling out a limited edition U.S. passport design featuring President Donald Trump’s face on the inside cover and other images to celebrate the country’s 250th anniversary of independence. Previews of the commemorative passport show Trump’s portrait overlaid on the Declaration of Independence on the inside cover with his signature in gold, as well as a page with an image of the founding fathers signing the Declaration of Independence. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🤡 美国国务院将发布印有特朗普头像的“美国250”限量版护照。美国国务院正在推出一款限量版美国护照设计，内页封面上印有唐纳德·特朗普总统的头像及其他图像，以庆祝美国独立250周年。纪念护照的预览显示，内页封面上特朗普的肖像叠加在《独立宣言》之上，并配有他的金色签名，此外还有一页印有开国元勋签署《独立宣言》的图像。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Today Israel killed at least: - 5 Lebanese women - 3 children and a fetus - 3 civil defense medical workers This excludes the elderly men and innocent teens. This is the ceasefire that is ongoing in Lebanon May everyone who is silent about this Jewish crime be punished here before the hereafter The photos shows: Martyrs of the Jibchit massacre in the overnight airstrike: Hajj Mohammad Jawad Bahja and his wife Hajja Latifa Amani Jaber, her daughter Mariam Hilal Bahja, and her son, the child Ali Al-Rida Hilal Bahja
text_zh: 今天以色列至少杀害了：- 5名黎巴嫩妇女 - 3名儿童和一名胎儿 - 3名民防医务人员 这还不包括老年男性和无辜的青少年。这就是黎巴嫩目前正在进行的“停火”。愿所有对这一犹太罪行保持沉默的人在来世之前先在此受到惩罚。照片显示：吉布奇特（Jibchit）大屠杀中隔夜空袭的烈士：哈吉·穆罕默德·贾瓦德·巴贾（Hajj Mohammad Jawad Bahja）及其妻子哈贾·拉蒂法·阿马尼·贾贝尔（Hajja Latifa Amani Jaber）、她的女儿玛丽亚姆·希拉尔·巴贾（Mariam Hilal Bahja）以及她的儿子，儿童阿里·里达·希拉尔·巴贾（Ali Al-Rida Hilal Bahja）

The attack is ongoing. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2049265475855540352/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）今晚，由于俄罗斯使用“见证者”（Shahed）/“天竺葵”（Geran）型远程攻击无人机进行打击，位于乌克兰敖德萨州的伊兹梅尔港口城市发生严重火灾。袭击仍在持续。https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2049265475855540352/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Putting the leader’s face on everything is a hallmark of authoritarian cult-of-personality regimes, from Stalin’s Soviet Union to North Korea’s Kim dynasty, where portraits appear on homes, schools, government buildings, posters, flags, currency, statues, and propaganda. Trump has now put his face or name on all of the following in his second term: — Passports — National Parks Passes — Trump Gold Cards — Trump class battleships — The Trump Kennedy Center for Performing Arts — TrumpRx — Trump’s signature on US paper currency — Gold coins from the Commission of Fine Arts — The Department of Justice — The Donald J Trump Institute of Peace — The Department of Labor — Trump accounts — The Department of Agriculture - Headquarters tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 将领导人的头像印在所有事物上是威权主义个人崇拜政权的标志，从斯大林的苏联到朝鲜的金氏王朝，肖像出现在住宅、学校、政府大楼、海报、旗帜、货币、雕像和宣传品上。特朗普在第二个任期内已将他的头像或名字印在以下所有事物上：— 护照 — 国家公园通行证 — 特朗普金卡 — 特朗普级战列舰 — 特朗普肯尼迪表演艺术中心 — TrumpRx — 特朗普在美国纸币上的签名 — 美术委员会发行的金币 — 司法部 — 唐纳德·J·特朗普和平研究所 — 劳工部 — 特朗普账户 — 农业部总部 推文

text: Open Source Intel RT @Osint613 : BREAKING 🔴 The United Arab Emirates, OPEC’s 3rd largest oil producer, announced it will leave OPEC and OPEC+ effective May 1. The move would free the UAE from cartel production quotas, allowing it to pump oil at full capacity, set its own export strategy and price crude without group restrictions. That could pave the way for higher UAE output, stronger state revenues and downward pressure on global oil prices. Lower prices and increased supply would likely be welcomed by President Trump, who has long criticized OPEC production limits and called for cheaper energy. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 转发 @Osint613 ：突发 🔴 欧佩克（OPEC）第三大石油生产国阿拉伯联合酋长国宣布，将于5月1日起退出欧佩克及欧佩克+。此举将使阿联酋摆脱卡特尔的生产配额，允许其满负荷开采石油、制定自己的出口战略，并在不受集团限制的情况下为原油定价。这可能为阿联酋提高产量、增加国家收入以及对全球油价施加下行压力铺平道路。价格下跌和供应增加可能会受到特朗普总统的欢迎，他长期以来一直批评欧佩克的生产限制，并呼吁降低能源价格。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @NatashaBertrand : "An Israeli military battalion that assaulted and detained a CNN team in the occupied West Bank has been redeployed after a one-month suspension, an Israeli security source told CNN.... Police have not yet released any findings or disciplinary measures following a military police investigation. The soldier who assaulted the CNN photojournalist has not faced any additional known suspension or disciplinary measures." via @OrenCNN https://www.cnn.com/2026/04/28/middleeast/israel-military-detained-cnn-team-redeployed-latam-intl tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）转发 @NatashaBertrand ：“据一位以色列安全消息人士告诉CNN，一个在被占领的西岸袭击并拘留CNN团队的以色列军事营在停职一个月后已被重新部署……在军事警察调查后，警方尚未发布任何调查结果或纪律处分措施。袭击CNN摄影记者的士兵没有面临任何已知的额外停职或纪律处分。” via @OrenCNN https://www.cnn.com/2026/04/28/middleeast/israel-military-detained-cnn-team-redeployed-latam-intl 推文

text: Open Source Intel The White House sent a memo to Capitol Hill saying Congress must “immediately fund DHS” before the administration can no longer pay tens of thousands of employees, Punchbowl reports. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 据 Punchbowl 报道，白宫向国会山发送了一份备忘录，称国会必须“立即为国土安全部提供资金”，否则政府将无法支付数万名员工的工资。 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Nuno Felix You are going to appreciate this one @Mpolymer 👇 A VERY important piece today in Israel’s Ynet by Nahum Barnea & Ronen Bergman on the botched regime change plan in the Iran war. It confirms regime change was “the heart of the plan,” with Netanyahu and the Mossad driving it and Trump on board: decapitate the leadership, foment protests, and back a Kurdish incursion from the west. What stands out most is the admission of how central Israeli influence ops in Iran became. Under Mossad chief Barnea, in recent years shaping Iranian public opinion shifted to a core priority, “driving influence moves” inside Iran and effectively turning it into a “weapons system” with effects “far beyond social media.” The strategy was explicit: topple from above and below, “lean on senior officials” while “fostering mass protest and armed resistance of minorities,” in "parallel." "The organization" for this op "began four years ago," the piece states, and "reached operational maturity two and a half years ago." The piece also acknowledges “immense” Israeli work in the “background” of the January protests, which were met with a violent crackdown killing thousands by Iranian authorities, who portrayed them as foreign-backed. The regime change war was itself was advanced because of these protests. The war was originally slated for June but expedited as conditions seemed to “ripen.” Yet it didn’t bear out to say the least. No mass uprising. No collapse. The regime “restored command and control” and survived what planners evidently thought would end it within days. Even more striking, the piece says the US was caught off guard by Iran’s Hormuz closure in part because Trump seemingly believed “the war would end within three days.” (!) The Kurdish component is especially revealing. It reflects a fundamental misreading of Iran’s internal dynamics, where an externally backed incursion involving separatist groups would more likely have triggered a nationalist backlash and unified much of the country against a perceived partition threat, rather than spurred mass uprising. In their own telling, Israel invested heavily in influence operation in Iran, fomenting unrest, and regime decapitation, but the core assumption that the system would collapse proved false. Now, after all this, the US is back to negotiations, with the goal of a likely narrower deal focused just on the nuclear file and sanctions relief. The piece ends with: “What started as a far-reaching Israeli move, rich in imagination, final in its solution, ends in heartache.” Link: https://www.ynet.co.il/news/article/yokra14748698#google_vignette - Sina Toossi tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Nuno Felix 你会喜欢这一篇 @Mpolymer 👇 今天以色列 Ynet 刊登了 Nahum Barnea 和 Ronen Bergman 的一篇非常重要的文章，关于伊朗战争中失败的政权更迭计划。它证实了政权更迭是“计划的核心”，由内塔尼亚胡和摩萨德推动，特朗普也参与其中：斩首领导层，煽动抗议，并从西部支持库尔德人的入侵。最引人注目的是他们承认以色列在伊朗的影响力行动变得多么核心。在摩萨德局长 Barnea 的领导下，近年来塑造伊朗公众舆论已成为核心优先事项，在伊朗内部“推动影响力行动”，并有效地将其变成一种“武器系统”，其影响“远超社交媒体”。该策略很明确：从上到下推翻，在“施压高级官员”的同时“并行”地“培养大规模抗议和少数民族的武装抵抗”。文章指出，该行动的“组织”始于四年前，并于两年半前“达到作战成熟度”。文章还承认以色列在 1 月份抗议活动的“背景”中做了“巨大的”工作，这些抗议活动遭到了伊朗当局的暴力镇压，造成数千人死亡，伊朗当局将其描述为外国支持的。政权更迭战争本身就是因为这些抗议活动而提前进行的。战争原定于 6 月进行，但由于情况似乎“成熟”而提前了。然而，至少可以说，结果并不理想。没有大规模起义。没有崩溃。政权“恢复了指挥和控制”，并在策划者显然认为几天内就会结束的行动中幸存下来。更令人震惊的是，文章称美国对伊朗关闭霍尔木兹海峡感到措手不及，部分原因是特朗普似乎认为“战争将在三天内结束”。（！）库尔德人的部分尤其具有启发性。它反映了对伊朗内部动态的根本性误读，即涉及分裂主义团体的外部支持入侵更有可能引发民族主义反弹，并使该国大部分地区团结起来反对感知到的分裂威胁，而不是引发大规模起义。按照他们自己的说法，以色列在伊朗的影响力行动、煽动动乱和政权斩首上投入了巨资，但系统会崩溃的核心假设被证明是错误的。现在，在经历了这一切之后，美国回到了谈判桌前，目标是达成一项可能更狭窄的协议，仅专注于核档案和制裁减免。文章结尾写道：“以一个富有想象力、解决方案最终的深远以色列行动开始，却以心碎告终。” 链接：https://www.ynet.co.il/news/article/yokra14748698#google_vignette - Sina Toossi 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Nuno Felix RT @SinaToossi : 👇 A VERY important piece today in Israel’s Ynet by Nahum Barnea & Ronen Bergman on the botched regime change plan in the Iran war. It confirms regime change was “the heart of the plan,” with Netanyahu and the Mossad driving it and Trump on board: decapitate the leadership, foment protests, and back a Kurdish incursion from the west. "The organization" for this op "began four years ago," the piece states, and "reached operational maturity two and a half years ago." The piece also acknowledges “immense” Israeli work in the “background” of the January protests, which were met with a violent crackdown killing thousands by Iranian authorities, who portrayed them as foreign-backed. The regime change war was itself was advanced because of these protests. The war was originally slated for June but expedited as conditions seemed to “ripen.” Yet it didn’t bear out to say the least. No mass uprising. No collapse. The regime “restored command and control” and survived what planners evidently thought would end it within days. Even more striking, the piece says the US was caught off guard by Iran’s Hormuz closure in part because Trump seemingly believed “the war would end within three days.” (!) The Kurdish component is especially revealing. It reflects a fundamental misreading of Iran’s internal dynamics, where an externally backed incursion involving separatist groups would more likely have triggered a nationalist backlash and unified much of the country against a perceived partition threat, rather than spurred mass uprising. In their own telling, Israel invested heavily in influence operation in Iran, fomenting unrest, and regime decapitation, but the core assumption that the system would collapse proved false. Now, after all this, the US is back to negotiations, with the goal of a likely narrower deal focused just on the nuclear file and sanctions relief. The piece ends with: “What started as a far-reaching Israeli move, rich in imagination, final in its solution, ends in heartache.” Link: https://www.ynet.co.il/news/article/yokra14748698#google_vignette tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Nuno Felix 转发 @SinaToossi : 👇 今天以色列 Ynet 刊登了 Nahum Barnea 和 Ronen Bergman 的一篇非常重要的文章，关于伊朗战争中失败的政权更迭计划。它证实了政权更迭是“计划的核心”，由内塔尼亚胡和摩萨德推动，特朗普也参与其中：斩首领导层，煽动抗议，并从西部支持库尔德人的入侵。最引人注目的是他们承认以色列在伊朗的影响力行动变得多么核心。在摩萨德局长 Barnea 的领导下，近年来塑造伊朗公众舆论已成为核心优先事项，在伊朗内部“推动影响力行动”，并有效地将其变成一种“武器系统”，其影响“远超社交媒体”。该策略很明确：从上到下推翻，在“施压高级官员”的同时“并行”地“培养大规模抗议和少数民族的武装抵抗”。文章指出，该行动的“组织”始于四年前，并于两年半前“达到作战成熟度”。文章还承认以色列在 1 月份抗议活动的“背景”中做了“巨大的”工作，这些抗议活动遭到了伊朗当局的暴力镇压，造成数千人死亡，伊朗当局将其描述为外国支持的。政权更迭战争本身就是因为这些抗议活动而提前进行的。战争原定于 6 月进行，但由于情况似乎“成熟”而提前了。然而，至少可以说，结果并不理想。没有大规模起义。没有崩溃。政权“恢复了指挥和控制”，并在策划者显然认为几天内就会结束的行动中幸存下来。更令人震惊的是，文章称美国对伊朗关闭霍尔木兹海峡感到措手不及，部分原因是特朗普似乎认为“战争将在三天内结束”。（！）库尔德人的部分尤其具有启发性。它反映了对伊朗内部动态的根本性误读，即涉及分裂主义团体的外部支持入侵更有可能引发民族主义反弹，并使该国大部分地区团结起来反对感知到的分裂威胁，而不是引发大规模起义。按照他们自己的说法，以色列在伊朗的影响力行动、煽动动乱和政权斩首上投入了巨资，但系统会崩溃的核心假设被证明是错误的。现在，在经历了这一切之后，美国回到了谈判桌前，目标是达成一项可能更狭窄的协议，仅专注于核档案和制裁减免。文章结尾写道：“以一个富有想象力、解决方案最终的深远以色列行动开始，却以心碎告终。” 链接：https://www.ynet.co.il/news/article/yokra14748698#google_vignette 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Russia’s Tuapse oil refinery continues to suffer a catastrophic fire almost 24 hours after it was targeted by a Ukrainian drone raid. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2049255994430050555/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 俄罗斯图阿普谢炼油厂在遭到乌克兰无人机袭击近 24 小时后，仍遭受灾难性火灾。 https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2049255994430050555/video/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix Don’t start things you cannot finish I usually reason when responding, but to this post, I have nothing to say about Europeans other than they are antisemite bigots. Spain's imports of Russian gas (under global sanctions) hit record hight, but EU judges Israel if it imports Russian grains (not under sanctions). - Hussain Abdul-Hussain tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 不要开始你无法完成的事情。我通常在回应时讲道理，但对于这篇文章，除了说欧洲人是反犹太主义的偏执狂外，我无话可说。西班牙进口俄罗斯天然气（在全球制裁下）创下历史新高，但欧盟却在评判以色列是否进口俄罗斯谷物（不在制裁范围内）。 - Hussain Abdul-Hussain 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @jimsciutto : New: Sen Mitch McConnell slams Pentagon for failing to spend #Ukraine aid passed by Congress: “Appropriators fully funded that authorization for fiscal 2026 with overwhelming support,” he wrote in The Washington Post. “Yet the Ukraine aid we passed months ago is now collecting dust at the Pentagon.” tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @jimsciutto : 新消息：参议员 Mitch McConnell 抨击五角大楼未能支出国会通过的 #Ukraine 援助资金：“拨款委员会在 2026 财年以压倒性支持完全资助了该授权，”他在《华盛顿邮报》上写道。“然而，我们几个月前通过的乌克兰援助资金现在正躺在五角大楼里吃灰。” 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 The U.S. Senate has voted in favour of blocking a resolution (S.J.Res. 124), aimed at blocking U.S. military intervention in Cuba with 51 in favour and 47 against @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 美国参议院投票通过了一项旨在阻止（S.J.Res. 124）决议的动议，该决议原本旨在阻止美国对古巴进行军事干预。投票结果为51票赞成，47票反对。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 Clashes erupted in the village of al-Duwayr in the eastern Deir ez-Zor countryside as Syrian Internal Security Forces attempted to arrest a wanted man who refused to surrender. The clashes resulted in injuries to three Internal Security Forces personnel. Syrian Internal Security Forces have sent significant reinforcements to the area, and clashes are ongoing. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 在叙利亚代尔祖尔省东部乡村的杜韦尔村（al-Duwayr），叙利亚内部安全部队试图逮捕一名拒绝投降的通缉犯时爆发了冲突。冲突导致三名内部安全部队人员受伤。叙利亚内部安全部队已向该地区派遣了大量增援部队，冲突仍在持续。@wfwitness

Standing ovation from Congress; even Vance gets up, following Speaker Johnson's lead. https://x.com/Archer83Able/status/2049241264843825450/video/1 tweet

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 The U.S. State Department is reportedly issuing a limited-edition passport to mark the country’s 250th anniversary. ➡️ The inside cover will feature President Donald Trump’s portrait and signature. ➡️ An interior page will include his image over a stylized version of the Declaration of Independence. Video is generated by grok AI tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 据报道，美国国务院正在发行限量版护照，以纪念该国建国250周年。 ➡️ 内封面上将印有唐纳德·特朗普总统的肖像和签名。 ➡️ 内页将包含他叠加在风格化《独立宣言》上的形象。视频由Grok AI生成 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 The U.S. is tightening the screws on China’s shadow oil network — and Iran is right in the middle of it. Washington has warned banks worldwide: dealing with China’s independent “teapot” refineries now carries serious sanctions risk. These small refineries, mainly in Shandong, are quietly responsible for absorbing nearly 90% of Iran’s total oil exports. According to the Treasury, some of these players are still tapping into the U.S. financial system for dollar transactions — while masking activity through front companies in Asia and the UAE, a shadow tanker fleet, ship-to-ship transfers, and falsified paperwork. Now, financial institutions are being told to dig deeper into any China-linked refinery deals. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 美国正在收紧对中国影子石油网络的控制——而伊朗正处于这一事件的中心。华盛顿已向全球银行发出警告：与中国独立的“茶壶”炼油厂进行交易现在面临严重的制裁风险。这些主要位于山东的小型炼油厂，悄悄承担了伊朗近90%的石油出口总量。据财政部称，其中一些参与者仍在利用美国金融系统进行美元交易——同时通过亚洲和阿联酋的空壳公司、影子油轮船队、船对船转运以及伪造文件来掩盖活动。现在，金融机构被要求深入调查任何与中国炼油厂相关的交易。 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇺🇸 🇺🇦 King Charles III speaking in front of U.S. congress: In the immediate aftermath of 9/11, when NATO invoked article five for the first time—we answered the call together, as our people have done so for more than a century, shoulder to shoulder through two world wars, the cold war, Afghanistan, and moments that have defined our shared security. Today, Mr. Speaker, that same unyielding resolve is needed for the defense of Ukraine and her most courageous people. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇺🇸 🇺🇦 查尔斯三世国王在美国国会发表讲话：在9/11事件发生后，当北约首次援引第五条款时——我们共同响应了号召，正如我们的人民一个多世纪以来所做的那样，在两次世界大战、冷战、阿富汗战争以及定义我们共同安全的时刻并肩作战。今天，议长先生，为了保卫乌克兰及其最勇敢的人民，同样坚定不移的决心是必要的。 @wfwitness

text: ▶ Итоги 28 апреля видеосводка от руководителя проекта @rybar Михаила Звинчука специально для @SolovievLive Ситуация в Мали , стремительно испортившаяся за последнее время, остается напряженной — после событий в Кидале под угрозой оказались уже не только Тессалит и Агельхок , но и южные направления. Север Мали сыплется как домино. На Ближнем Востоке картинка также не шибко радужная. Израильтяне продолжают решать ливанский вопрос силой, а «Хезболла» учит АОИ тому, что бронебульдозер без нормальной защиты от дронов — это обычный расходник. При этом продолжается иранская челночная дипломатия. Вчера министр иностранных дел побывал в Санкт-Петербурге — в Тегеране могут рассматривать Россию как возможного посредника. Главный же медиатор конфликта в лице Пакистана сейчас занят разборками с Афганистаном . В зоне СВО российские войска продолжают наступление на Бурлукском , Славянском и Константиновском направлениях — причем на последнем окончательно зачищена Ильиновка . Наши спецслужбы также показывают хороший результат, ведь сегодня они освободили задержанного в Польше российского историка. Насколько далеко зайдёт военное сближение России и Северной Кореи , как японская милитаризация может повлиять на поставки оружия киевскому режиму и ждать ли перемен с новым руководством Россотрудничества — в новом выпуске «Разборов Рыбаря — Итоги дня» . #дайджест #разбор #эфиры ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ ОК | ✉ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: ▶ 4月28日总结：项目负责人 @rybar 米哈伊尔·兹温丘克（Mikhail Zvinchuk）专为 @SolovievLive 制作的视频简报。马里的局势近期急剧恶化，依然十分紧张——继基达尔事件后，不仅泰萨利特和阿格霍克受到威胁，南部方向也岌岌可危。马里北部正像多米诺骨牌一样崩塌。在中东，局势同样不容乐观。以色列人继续以武力解决黎巴嫩问题，而真主党则在教导以色列国防军（IDF），没有适当无人机防御的装甲推土机只是普通的消耗品。与此同时，伊朗的穿梭外交仍在继续。昨天，伊朗外交部长访问了圣彼得堡——德黑兰可能将俄罗斯视为潜在的调解人。而作为冲突的主要调解方，巴基斯坦目前正忙于处理与阿富汗的纠纷。在特别军事行动区，俄军继续在布尔卢克、斯拉维扬斯克和康斯坦丁诺夫卡方向推进——其中在最后一个方向，伊利诺夫卡已被彻底清理。我们的特种部队也展现了良好的战果，今天他们解救了在波兰被捕的俄罗斯历史学家。俄罗斯与朝鲜的军事结盟会走多远，日本的军事化如何影响对基辅政权的武器供应，以及俄罗斯联邦独联体事务、侨民及国际人道合作署（Rossotrudnichestvo）新领导层是否会带来变革——尽在最新一期《雷巴尔分析——每日总结》。#摘要 #分析 #直播 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ OK | ✉ Zen 💸 支持我们

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Fars: Iran and Pakistan have officially launched six new overland transit corridors in an effort to circumvent the U.S. blockade in the Strait of Hormuz. The main route begins at Pakistan’s Gwadar port and passes through Iran toward Central Asia, particularly Uzbekistan, but also has corridors linked to Gwadar, Karachi and Port Qasim. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 法尔斯通讯社：伊朗和巴基斯坦已正式启动六条新的陆路过境走廊，旨在绕过美国对霍尔木兹海峡的封锁。主路线始于巴基斯坦瓜达尔港，经伊朗通往中亚，特别是乌兹别克斯坦，同时还设有连接瓜达尔、卡拉奇和卡西姆港的走廊。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇷🇺🇲🇱 Russia’s Africa Corps says the situation in Mali remains difficult, with its forces and Malian troops continuing operations against militant groups, including airstrikes targeting camps over the past day. The first clip was taken by a Bayraktar TB2…" ⚡️ 🇲🇱 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 The Russian Ministry of Defence has released footage of strikes against JNIM terrorists during hostilities on April 25th in Mali. They report the operation was an attempted coup and claimed the attackers numbered around 12,000 fighters who tried to seize key sites in the capital of Bamako. Russia’s Africa Corps, alongside Malian troops, repelled the attacks using drones, helicopters, aircraft and ground forces, claiming heavy militant losses and the destruction of vehicles and equipment. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇷🇺🇲🇱 俄罗斯非洲军团表示，马里的局势依然严峻，其部队与马里军队继续针对武装团体开展行动，包括过去一天对营地进行的空袭。第一段视频由 Bayraktar TB2 拍摄……” ⚡️ 🇲🇱 🇷🇺 🇷🇺 俄罗斯国防部发布了 4 月 25 日在马里敌对行动期间打击 JNIM 恐怖分子的视频。他们报告称，此次行动是一场未遂政变，并声称袭击者人数约为 12,000 名，他们试图夺取首都巴马科的关键地点。俄罗斯非洲军团与马里军队一道，利用无人机、直升机、飞机和地面部队击退了袭击，声称武装分子损失惨重，并摧毁了车辆和装备。@wfwitness

text: Nuno Felix RT @atrupar : standing ovation after King Charles sings the praises of NATO and says "that same unyielding resolve is needed for the defense of Ukraine" https://twitter.com/atrupar/status/2049210113471185106/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @atrupar：查尔斯国王歌颂北约并表示“保卫乌克兰需要同样的坚定决心”后，全场起立鼓掌 https://twitter.com/atrupar/status/2049210113471185106/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Comey responds: "Well, they're back. This time about a picture of seashells on a North Carolina beach a year ago, and this won't be the end of it. But nothing has changed with me. I'm still innocent, I'm still not afraid, and I still believe in the independent federal judiciary, so let's go. But it's really important that all of us remember this is not who we are as a country. This is not how the Department of Justice is supposed to be. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel Comey 回应：“好吧，他们又来了。这次是因为一年前北卡罗来纳州海滩上贝壳的照片，而且这不会是结束。但我没有改变。我仍然是清白的，我仍然不害怕，我仍然相信独立的联邦司法机构，所以让我们开始吧。但非常重要的是，我们所有人都必须记住，这不是我们作为一个国家的本来面目。司法部不应该是这样的。” 推文

text_zh: Nuno Felix https://x.com/atrupar/status/2049210113471185106/video/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Pakistan has reportedly activated six overland trade corridors into Iran to work around the U.S. blockade, facilitating the movement of more than 3,000 containers, according to Fars News Agency. Effective immediately, the arrangement permits a wide range of goods, including canned imports from third countries, to be transported through Pakistan using routes that connect Gwadar, Karachi, and Port Qasim with the Taftan and Gabd border crossings. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 据法尔斯通讯社报道，巴基斯坦据称已启动六条通往伊朗的陆路贸易走廊，以绕过美国的封锁，促进了超过 3,000 个集装箱的运输。该安排立即生效，允许包括来自第三国的罐装进口商品在内的多种商品，通过连接瓜达尔、卡拉奇和卡西姆港与塔夫坦和加布德边境口岸的路线，经由巴基斯坦运输。 推文

text: Open Source Intel James Comey on indictment: “I’m still innocent and I’m still unafraid.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049244216845332755/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel James Comey 关于起诉书的回应：“我仍然是清白的，我仍然无所畏惧。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049244216845332755/photo/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) The King of the United Kingdom Charles III receives a standing ovation from the United States Congress after mentioning the need for the continued support to Ukraine. "In the immediate aftermath of 9/11, when NATO invoked Article 5 for the first time and the United Nations Security Council was united in the face of terror, we answered the call together, as our people have done so for more than a century, shoulder to shoulder through two world wars, the Cold War, Afghanistan, and moments that have defined our shared security. Today, Mr. Speaker, that same unyielding resolve is needed for the defense of Ukraine and her most courageous people." tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 英国国王查尔斯三世在提到需要继续支持乌克兰后，获得了美国国会的起立鼓掌。“在 9/11 事件发生后，当北约首次援引第 5 条款，且联合国安理会在恐怖主义面前团结一致时，我们共同响应了号召，正如我们的人民一个多世纪以来所做的那样，在两次世界大战、冷战、阿富汗战争以及定义我们共同安全的时刻，肩并肩共同奋斗。今天，议长先生，保卫乌克兰及其最勇敢的人民也需要同样的坚定决心。” 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 The U.S. State Department plans on releasing a commerative passport for the the U.S.'s 250th anniversary that prominently features U.S. President Trump's face. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国国务院计划发布一款纪念美国建国250周年的纪念护照，护照上将显著印有美国总统特朗普的头像。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Former FBI Director James Comey has been indicted by the Justice Department on two felony counts: knowingly making a threat against the President and transmitting an interstate communication containing a threat to kill the President. Each count carries a maximum sentence of ten years. The charges stem from an Instagram post of seashells spelling “86 47” – a reference some interpret as eliminating (“86”) the 47th president, Donald Trump. Comey deleted the post, saying he did not realise some associate those numbers with violence and that he opposes violence of any kind. Legal analysts have called the indictment “petty”, “retributive” and a “stretch of the imagination”, predicting it will likely be dismissed. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 前联邦调查局局长詹姆斯·科米已被司法部起诉，罪名是两项重罪：蓄意威胁总统，以及发送包含杀害总统威胁的州际通讯。每项罪名最高可判处十年监禁。这些指控源于他在Instagram上发布的一张海贝拼写“86 47”的照片——一些人将其解读为清除（“86”）第47任总统唐纳德·特朗普。科米删除了该帖子，称他没有意识到有些人会将这些数字与暴力联系起来，并表示他反对任何形式的暴力。法律分析人士称这项起诉“琐碎”、“报复性”且“牵强附会”，并预测该案很可能会被驳回。@wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Russia's May 9 parade will feature no military vehicles for the first time. The Defense Ministry blamed "the current operational situation." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049235424179081719/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：俄罗斯5月9日的阅兵式将首次不出现军用车辆。国防部将其归咎于“当前的作战形势”。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049235424179081719/photo/1 推文
